entry.title: Re: SAP Digital Skills Initiative
entry.content:
Hi @awais7764 - I would recommend that you join the Beginner Corner and you will see a post there from @David_Chaviano where application texts can be submitted until Nov 4, 2024.
Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

I hope this helps and hope you enjoy your time in SAP Community!

entry.title: Purge External Users in 360 Reviews
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I would like to ask for your help in the following topic: we found that there are a lot of external users created due to the 360 Reviews (adding external participants). We would like to schedule a purge to delete their data (first name, last name and email) but not the answers provided.

I found some documentation mentioning that a "DRTM 360 Reviews - External User Purge" could be created for this purpose (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_PERFORMANCE_AND_GOALS/f93a40604d3f4d36a5c45560e3e483d9/5b0ce020e9a3433cb14e1cabab0f5fc0.html?locale=en-US).

However, I saw two more KBA's (https://me.sap.com/notes/3072912/E and https://me.sap.com/notes/3128427/E) using different types of purge: "Purge Inactive User" and "DRTM Master Data Purge" regarding the purge of external 360 users. But these last two, I don't think it's possible to make them recurrent.

Could you please share your insights, what should be the best approach according to your knowledge and experience?

Many thanks in advance,
Kind Regards,
Sofi

entry.title: Re: Role design strategy for SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Dhanshree

Can we have test user ID's created similar to that of on-premise system for unit testing ?According to my understanding we need to have the users created in IAS to have them accessed in S4 Public system.

Is there any other way to have multiple test users created for testing purpose without having so many users created with Email ID's in IAS?

Thanks

Ganesh

entry.title: Re: General Display Name Opt out in Second Half of 2024
entry.content:
Hi @ArjenVHooydonk ,

It is not supported to configure name format for general display name on employee level as formal name. But you can configure formal name in name format for general display name. Then formal name is used for general display name. 

Thanks

Harvey

entry.title: Re: "Error Getting Function" during RFC connection in CPI
entry.content: Did you find the solution of this issue? I am also facing the same error.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I graduated with a degree in Business Administration from the faculty of BIS, where I studied subjects such as accounting, costing, finance, and database management, all of which are integral to understanding business operations. My strong interest in SAP, particularly in the FICO module, drives my desire to further my knowledge in this area. I believe that obtaining an SAP certification will not only enhance my skills but also empower me to contribute effectively to organizations by optimizing their financial processes. This intensive represents a valuable opportunity for me to deepen my expertise and make a meaningful impact in the field of business management.

entry.title: Deleted Support Organization is still selectable as partner on ITSM Incident, RFCs, etc.
entry.content:
When assigning a support team to an incident, one can choose a support team that has been deleted from the support organization.

I believe this is possible because the business partner associated with the obsolete support organization is still valid, even though it has been flagged for deletion.  How can the obsolete support organization and the unwanted business partner be removed from the selection list for assigning partners?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Deleted Support Organization is still selectable as p...
entry.content:
You may mark the Business Partner with the flag "central lock" in the status tab in transaction BP. That should prevent it from being searchable.

 

On the other hand, you may just archive or delete the Business Partner.

Please also check SAP KBA ##1795412 - Customer / Vendor Master Data archiving, and Notes ##1825608 - Simplified Blocking and Deletion of Central Business Partner and ##2599676 - Transaction BUPA_DEL is obsolete.

 

The following help pages might help too:

  • SAP Help Document - Archiving Customer Master Data (FI-AR, SD)
  • SAP Help Document - Archiving Vendor Master Data (FI-AP)
  • SAP Help Document - Archiving in Customer/Vendor Integration

Best regards, 

 

SAP Support

entry.title: Please reset the TFA.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Please reset the TFA for one of our administrators.

 

Best Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Please reset the TFA.
entry.content:
Hi,

 

One of your administrators can send a TFA Reset Email to another administrator.

Please refer Product documentation about Admin Actions.

"Send TFA Reset Email - send the administrator a TFA reset email. Once the user clicks the link, they are able to reset their TFA device. Use this to allow the admin to add a new device or change the authentication method assigned to the current device.".

 

Best Regards,

SAP Customer Data Solutions

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello!

I'm thrilled to announce my interest in participating in SAP's digital skills initiative as I embark on a career transition from teaching chemistry to becoming a Developer – Integration Specialist. This exciting opportunity aligns perfectly with my passion for technology and my dedication to lifelong learning. I believe my analytical skills and commitment to staying current with industry trends will make me a valuable asset in this program. SAP's renowned certification program is the ideal pathway for me to gain the skills needed for a successful transition into the tech world. I eagerly anticipate the chance to contribute to this initiative and expand my career horizons.

Thank you this opportunity,

Nguyen Duy Tai (Mr.)

entry.title: Re: DRFout configuration for SAP CAR DDF
entry.content: could you please share

entry.title: Re: SAP Private linky swear with Azure – running Cloud Connector and SAP Private Link side-by-side
entry.content:
Hi @Martin-Pankraz , @gowrisankar_m2 

We are currently running our SAP workloads on Azure, and SAP BTP is being utilized extensively for various services, including mobile services. The connection between SAP BTP and our backend systems is currently facilitated through the SAP Cloud Connector.

Given the recent introduction of PLS, which allows for secure, private network connections between SAP BTP and Azure-hosted workloads without traversing the public internet, we are exploring the possibility of leveraging PLS for backend connectivity.

1. Can PLS replace SAP Cloud Connector in our current setup, where all workloads are hosted on Azure and the primary objective is to ensure secure, private communication between SAP BTP and the backend systems?

2. Principal Propagation and Identity Management:
- In scenarios requiring Principal Propagation, does SAP recommend continuing the use of SAP Cloud Connector alongside PLS?
- Does PLS alone support Principal Propagation, or is Cloud Connector necessary to handle identity management, single sign-on (SSO), and similar use cases?

3. Best Practice Guidance:
- For environments where both SAP BTP and the backend systems are hosted entirely on Azure, would SAP recommend using PLS in conjunction with Cloud Connector as a best practice?
- Are there any scenarios where SAP explicitly recommends retaining Cloud Connector even when PLS is implemented, such as for fine-grained access control, auditing/logging, or certificate-based authentication?

Thank you for your assistance, and we look forward to your expert advice.

Best regards,
Mofizur

entry.title: Re: Urgent Issue : Transport API Management with TMS to different tenant
entry.content:
@gos You need to configure the APIManagement destination correctly. Pls follow the steps -

Prerequisites

  1. You have created a service instance and service key in SAP API Management, API portal using apiportal-apiaccess plan.
  2. You have assigned the APIPortal.Administrator role to the service instance.

Configuring Destination

Use the service key credentials to configure the destination as follows - 

Name

Provide value as APIManagement.

This value is case-sensitive.

Type

HTTP

Description

You can provide a description for your reference. This field is optional.

URL

Provide the url from the service key details.

The format is: <url>/api/1.0/transportmodule/Transport

Proxy Type

Internet

Authentication

OAuth2ClientCredentials

Client ID

Provide the value of the clientid field from the service key details.

Client Secret

Provide the value of the clientsecret field from the service key details.

Token Service URL Type

Dedicated

For more information, see APIManagement Destination

entry.title: Workbooks for SAP Cloud Service
entry.content: I'm preparing to certify in SAP Service Cloud as we will implement Employee Central Service Center. With Successfactors we always use workbooks to get the customer requirements. I cannot find anything similar for SAP Cloud Service. Can you confirm if there are workbooks or what do consultants use to get the customer requirements?

entry.title: Material Flow Rules -Logistics Source and Destination Services
entry.content:
How to get the desired logistics area for inbound/ outbound process while confirming the task?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Material Flow Rules -Logistics Source and Destination...
entry.content:
To ensure the system fetches the desired logistics area, it is important to maintain material flow rules for inbound and outbound processes.

These rules should be set at the site level, specifying the required strategy at both the source and destination levels.

For more details, refer :Logistics Source and Destination Services | SAP Help Portal

There are existing articles to refer :2608268 - System is Proposing Wrong Logistics Area While Doing Post Goods Receipt (sap.com)

entry.title: Re: Archive SD scheduling agreements / VBUK-GBSTK = ' '
entry.content:
I searched also for a very long time and also tried to convince to provide a report "closing" such scheduling agreements. (similiar to VL_COMPLETE for deliveries)
But in the end only a z-report will help or delete the SA completely (is possible with this status) instead of archiving.

entry.title: Re: Copy Measures across hierarchies member using Advanced Formulas (Data Action)
entry.content:
Hi @savik 

I have a few questions about your requirements to make clear my understanding.

First,

Does the Source scope(blue square) data should be copied to 2 RED squares? It seems that the source data is not copied to the First Red square in your expected result.

Second, the measure "Value" is not copied to the Target scope in your script, but the fact data of the measure "Value" is copied on your expected result grid.

Regards,

Moonjun

entry.title: API for automatic upload of edited Test Case in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hello ,

We are looking for an option to edit an SAP Cloud ALM Test Case in the downloaded excel file, and then upload it through an API automatically. Can you please let us know the appropriate API available for this purpose?

 

Thanks & Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: API for automatic upload of edited Test Case in SAP C...
entry.content:
SAP Cloud ALM currently does not offer an API with this functionality. There is a Test Automation API, but it does not allow the upload of new/edited manual Test Cases or Excel file content. 

A roadmap item exists related to the creation of an API for Test Case uploads. There is currently no estimated delivery date for this feature, so please check back on the roadmap entry periodically for new information about the progress of the feature.

Additionally, another related feature for the Test Preparation app is (currently) planned for Q2 2025. It will allow the mass upload of new or edited test cases via the Test Preparation UI.

Until these features are delivered, the only option for Excel file upload is to use the option to upload the edited Excel file manually via the Test Preparation app.

entry.title: Rehire with New Employment Doesn't work with SAP C4C
entry.content:
We recently implemented ECP and as a result also enabled a new functionality in SF called rehire with new employment, whereby the employee is given a new assignment ID and this is used as the employee identifier going forward. Unfortunately this solution does not seem to be compatible with ECSC - the old employee ID is still being pulled out and the old employment info with it. We would need this to pull out the current employment info in ECSC as currently the old number is pulling out the old employment info and this is leading to tickets ending up in the wrong territories e.g. weekly payroll when EE is now monthly. We would therefore need a possibility to either include assignment ID in the integration mapping or to have multiple records for the same employee, or the ability to overwrite the employee information with the new employment info.

Has anyone else experienced this issue? If so, could you please vote on my influence request so that this can be acknowledged by SAP - 

Improvement Request Details - Customer Influence (sap.com)

 

Many thanks,

Oliwia

 

#successfactors

entry.title: Re: Combination Order DIMP, error "No order selected"
entry.content:
Yes, I think it was solved as he wrote: "I found the the issue, it was due to limitations and restriction on order set as per SAP standards". The link to sap.help that was provided doesn't open anymore, as it refers to an outdated release. But the documentation is still there, please see here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/34de0103497c4b80a7c7fbf6952ff971/40cfc353b677b44ce10000000a174cb4.html?locale=en-US&state=DRAFT and sub-nodes on the topic of selection and exits.

Basically, you would need to ensure that a couple of conditions are fulfilled: the Selection Profile fits, and characteristics or whatever selection criteria you use will select the right orders, also those selection performed in the exits, e.g. EXIT_SAPLMILL_OC_001. Furthermore, planning unit of measure must be the same as the base unit of measure. The original orders must have the same production plant but they can have different planning plants. Orders must not be combined orders already when combining, also no external processing allowed, no co-products allowed. 

Hope this helps,

Alfred

entry.title: Re: #COE#HHT how to put Special Character Tab to Constant field of payment file?
entry.content: Hi! Could you please clarify what is the format? Constant means constant value. You mentioned here Tab, what are your preferences here? Thanks,

entry.title: Re: Integration between SAP Cloud ALM and Dynatrace
entry.content:
Hi,

We are creating this BTP Destination to integrate SAP Cloud ALM with Dynatrace, using a new property "URL.headers.Authorization" and passing it a token generated in Dynatrace: API-Token, but we are still getting the 401 error in the end. Would you know what syntax could be used in the field where the token value is included?,or what would be another alternative configuration?

 

We are passing the token value in this format: Api-Token dt0c01.xxxxxxxxxx

https://docs.dynatrace.com/docs/dynatrace-api/basics/dynatrace-api-authentication#authenticate

Thanks in advance

Best Regards!

My name is Sedara aanuoluwapo and I’m excited to be a part of this SAP Learning Community! I'm done with my learning part Generative AI.

I’m really looking forward to expanding my knowledge.. hoping to get my voucher soon.

entry.title: Re: Seamless planning integration between SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere - product FAQ
entry.content:
Hi @MKreitlein ,

 

You are addressing two main points if I understand correctly.

1. No possibility to load from DSP into planning tables (SAC model tables) directly. 

--> We plan to enable SAP Analytics Cloud models as targets for SAP Datasphere's transformation flows. No timeline yet

2. Virtual access to the data in SAP Datasphere (what you referred to as a composite provider like concept)

--> We are already working on a virtual consumption of data residing in SAP Datasphere for the planning models. You would be able to integrate external versions like actuals (could be plan data from another seamless planning model as well) from another fact table/view in the Datasphere space that the model is deployed to into the planning model. You cannot change this external data but you can reference it for planning. I.e., you can copy it to a plan version in your planning model or reference it in calculations, data actions...

 

With these mentioned features, I hope we get close to what you envision.

Finally on your question: You can consume the planning facts in SAP Datasphere views. We are currently designing the semantic re-use for the version dimension so that you can expose it as a master data table in the data builder and match it with your Datasphere data in which you will also have the version as a semantic type.

BR
Max

entry.title: Re: Performance issues with standard GLAccountBalanceFlow...

entry.title: Re: CAT2 timesheet posting directly to status 30 in CATSD...
entry.content:
In T-code: CAC1-

General settings:

1. Need to tick Release on Saving.

Approval:

2. Select Without approval procedure.

entry.title: Difference between On-Hand and Available Stock
entry.content:
What is the difference between On-hand and Available stock in SAP Business ByDesign?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Difference between On-Hand and Available Stock
entry.content:
In SAP Business ByDesign, the difference between on-hand and available stock is that on-hand stock is the total amount of inventory physically available, while available stock is the on-hand stock minus any quantities reserved for open transactions.

On-hand stock
The total number of items in a warehouse, including items committed to orders 
 
Available stock
The on-hand stock minus any quantities reserved for open transactions, such as sales orders, stock transfer, and safety stock , production requests etc.

entry.title: Re: What is condition REA1 Rebate Accruals for in Sales Condition Contract? (S/4HANA Cloud)
entry.content: What could be the reason that RED1 is negative in delta accrual settlement?

Product Group is essential for Production Integration with S4HANA EWM to create PMR document.

Where can the Product Group be maintained since MM02 is not available for S4HANA retail system ?

Regards,

Amod Bhide

I've tried the option Sum or Count without success.

If you have any clue to build my CDS. 

I suppose we need 2 CDS but tried it with no more success.

entry.title: 怎么手工填入profit center并且覆盖cost center带出来的default profit center?
entry.content:
在Public Cloud "Post General Journal Entries" app中，在填写cost center后，如何能手工填入需要的profit center从而overwrite default profit center？

以下的error会带出cost center中的default profit center并且不允许覆盖原始值：

entry.title: Re: CDS combine lines into one
entry.content:
Hi Helge,
see below example - should work with internal table and database table. Just copy and try:


TYPES: BEGIN OF ts_material,
         material TYPE matnr,
         col1     TYPE text20,
         col2     TYPE text20,
         col3     TYPE text20,
       END OF ts_material,

       tt_material TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ts_material WITH DEFAULT KEY.

DATA(t_material) = VALUE tt_material(
                                      material = '111111' ( col1 = '111111_1' ) ( col2 = '111111_2' ) ( col3 = '111111_3' )
                                      material = '222222' ( col1 = '222222_1' ) ( col2 = '222222_2' ) ( col3 = '222222_3' )
).

DATA(t_result) = VALUE tt_material( ).

SELECT FROM @t_material AS t_material     ##ITAB_KEY_IN_SELECT
  FIELDS DISTINCT
         material,
         MAX( col1 ) OVER( PARTITION BY material ) AS col1,
         MAX( col2 ) OVER( PARTITION BY material ) AS col2,
         MAX( col3 ) OVER( PARTITION BY material ) AS col3
  ORDER BY material
  INTO TABLE @t_result.

entry.title: Assistance Required for Storing Fields in Billing Document
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

I hope this message finds you well.

We are implementing functionality to store specific fields when saving a billing document, aiming to capture this information in a custom CDS View for reporting purposes.

After reviewing the SAP Help documentation, we could not find a suitable Business Add-In (BAdI) that triggers during the saving process of billing documents, particularly in the Create Billing Document app and the Billing Due List app.

Could you kindly recommend a BAdI that would align with these requirements? Your prompt assistance will be highly appreciated.

Thank you for your support.

entry.title: Re: Performance issues with standard GLAccountBalanceFlow...
entry.content: Thanks Simon. Appreciate that it's difficult to give an answer to anything performance related such as this without looking at the specific system. We did raise incidents locally to investigate, but I'm raising this here publically in case other customers are having similar issues with this one particular CDS, because it could indicate a more fundamental issue with how it has been created compared to the other CDS views which tend to work normally. I've seen this on multiple projects now, so want to make sure it's got some visibility.

From a technical point of view, absolutely top! Thank you very much. 👍

entry.title: Re: Urgent Issue : Transport API Management with TMS to different tenant
entry.content: @gauravi_shukla

entry.title: The Role of a CIO is to be a Challenger
entry.content:
In this post, I share how CIO's and their teams can develop the challenger mindset and how that can benefit the entire organisation: 

  • Challenge something (policy, practice, process, assumption, belief systems, behaviours) rather than someone.
  • Be soft when challenging. Nudge using exploratory ways like "5 Why's" to arrive at the basic assumption / belief systems / behaviours
  • Relentlessly focus on the values of your organisation. Every organisation is centered on some function (sales centric, marketing centric, product centric, partner centric, etc). Challenging status quo in these functions have the highest returns on investments.
  • Relentlessly challenge status quo in your own organisation first. This has multiple benefits - you see the benefits for your org and at the same time, you build up social capital with other teams so you can credibly challenge the status quo in their respective functions.
  • Build a community of champions. Start with your own teams and enroll people whose lives your team has impacted positively. This community of champions are then your feet on the ground and are multipliers of the challenger mindset that you want to seed within your organisation.
  • Run internal debates. Find topics that are top of mind and run debates, inviting people from different background (sometimes vendors and partners as well) who can argue from both sides of the debates. For example - Is AI good for your business (yes and no). You can then pick and choose from both the perspectives and stay away from being on the extremes.
  • Run simulations. One of the biggest challenge that established companies face today comes from digitally native startups. Can you organise simulations and invite teams to come up with ideas to disrupt your current business? Then use these ideas to decide if you want to invest in them or to find a way to mitigate the risks posed by these ideas.

Some of the qualities that we need to develop in order to be have a challenger mindset:

  1. The ability to be comfortable being uncomfortable.
  2. The ability to absorb pressure and stay calm.
  3. The ability to create, maintain and alleviate creative tension.
  4. The ability to stay focused on the "something" that you are challenging even when "someone" feels threatened by it.
  5. The ability to access hitherto unaccessible resources by being resourceful.
  6. Tenacious with a positive attitude.
  7. Be trustworthy.

As someone once said, "Intelligent challenges are like the oxygen for progress".

"The riskiest thing one can do is just maintain status quo" - Bob Iger, Chairman - Disney

entry.title: Re: Handling reverse charge mechanism for SST
entry.content: Thank you for the response, Lucy. The blog offers a clearer understanding of how the reverse charge mechanism is managed in SAP.

entry.title: Product expected to be classified even though no control check box is set - SAP GTS
entry.content:
Hi , I have an issue during license determination for US Re export

we have legal regulartion ZEAR for US control and Z_USR for US Re-export

In control settings for EAR , I have set every product is relevant for check as per client's requirement

But there are some products that should not be checked for license so I use the 'no control check box' in master data

But when a document is created it says that product is not fully classified for EAR

The detrmination file was given by data provider and we cannot manually change the strategy for this license exception

Kindly provide some suggestions

entry.title: Re: Copy Measures across hierarchies member using Advance...
entry.content:
Hi @MoonJun, thank you for the reply. 

1. Yes,  data should be copied into the red squares as in the example (my bad, i fixed in the original post)

2. I'm not sure i understood, sorry. Would you mind to show me more specifically the point?

I want to give more info, trying to be more precise\clear and summarize the logic.

The formula must "iterate" every row for the combination of dimensions with Flow = "#",  then copy the measures values into the same combination but with Flow NOT EQUAL to "#"  - which are dynamic, different for every combination of Account-Product-Entity-Owner. 

Thanks again for your help.

entry.title: Re: Urgent Issue : Transport API Management with TMS to d...
entry.content:
@gauravi_shukla 
Thank you for your advice on my question.

I understood that I had to create destination of API Management.
But now, we can't create API Portal instance because newly subscription of API Portal is rejected.

How can I get the service key of API Management Instance in this situation?
I guess the service key is not same one of Cloud Integration.

Or are there any other solutions transport API Management?

entry.title: BADI or user exit for CK11n
entry.content:
Hi All,

I would like to know if there is a user exit or a badi to change the total value in ck11n

entry.title: Dimensions Account SAC
entry.content:
I team, i wonder if i can preform an import of an excel data to a dimension account, and still map it?

Keep up the good work!

 

Bernardo Santos

entry.title: Re: Copy Measures across hierarchies member using Advance...
entry.content:
Ok. Based on your last example, the code is even simpler: 

MEMBERSET [d/Account] = ("C010101", "C010102", "C010103", "C010104")
MEMBERSET [d/Measure] = ("Value", "PERCENTAGE")
MEMBERSET [d/Flow] != "#"

DATA() = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Flow] = "#")

entry.title: Re: Publication from optimized design mode not possible w...
entry.content: As it's not listed in roadmap, I don't have exact quarter number. But should be earlier than that.

entry.title: Re: I can not access the OData service from BAS.
entry.content: @Mahmood99 please check if the Service is reachable and if you have the correct rights to access it. Go to the network tab and check the response and also check TX /IWFND/ERROR_LOG in your system for errors

entry.title: How to copy from actuals and budget to forecast in sac planning
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have requirement to copy first six months data from actuals and next six months from budget to forecast version. User can select the parameter Fiscal Year as input, then need to copy same FY data from Actuals and Budget to Forecast.

Can anyone help us on how to achieve this?

Regards,
Vasu

entry.title: how to add custom tab in PR item level in sap cloud public edition using Custom Field or logic app?
entry.content:
Business Requirement -> New Tab addition in PR item level with Multiple custom fields

Environment -> SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud Edition 

App -> Manage Purchase Requisitions – Professional

 

 

 

  1. In the highlighted area business expecting addition of new tab / section (ex. Professional Details)
  2. Inside that new tab we will add custom fields as per requirement
  3. As of now we can be able to add only fields in the existing tab, or we can use available tab/sections in Adapt UI screen.
  4. We want to create new tab/ section, so we can add custom fields there , please help

entry.title: Re: How to redeem a campaign code to get a free SAP Certification exam attempt and schedule your exa
entry.content:
Hi! David,

This is Neha, part of SAP Tech Finance Cohort3 from StartSteps, Berlin. As suggested by you during our online FAQ session, I am commenting here to redeem an extra chance for the 3rd attempt for SAP Certification exams that I intend to give in March 2025.

Looking forward to receive the coupon code from you shortly.

Thanks and Cheers!

Neha

entry.title: Re: Trouble while downloading SAP HANA studio setup from SAP software downloads.
entry.content: My 2 cents: I guess IMC_STUDIO2_259_14-80000323.SAR corresponds to 2.00.059.14, doesn't it? (it comprises all, so it's the last revision) So, it's HANA studio 2.3.78.

entry.title: Re: Error in Eclipse
entry.content: You say "ui5" but you're installing the ABAP and/or BW development tools (and your question tag is ABAP Development). The latest ADT tools are for Eclipse 2024-09. Why would you want to install? What would you want to use the old Eclipse Juno?

entry.title: 🟡 Spooktoberfest 2024
entry.content:
For Week 4 of Devtoberfest, it’s Spooktoberfest! That means it’s time to share your favorite spooky tech stories, decorations, or costumes!

To participate, you only need to complete the following steps.

Step 1: You can do either one or all of the following: write about a spooky tech story, take a picture of some spooky decorations, or take a picture of you in a costume. The stories can be about anything that leans spooky, like weird bugs that happened for incredibly strange reasons, that time you saw a ghost in the server room, or a time your laptop crashed right after threatening it. The pictures can be of anything spooky, Halloween, or fall related, like house décor or someone in a costume (pets included!). This rule isn’t strict so interpret it as creatively as you’d like!

Step 2: Post your spooky material in the comments of this discussion post before EOD October 27th. If you’ve already posted your material elsewhere, feel free to link that in the comments.

Step 3 (optional): Check out the rest of the comments to get in that spooky mood for October 31st!

 

Be as creative or relaxed as you want. The only important thing is that you have fun.

For my own decorations, I have this shelving behind my desk that I like to decorate for meetings when I turn on my camera. For October, I decorated by shelves with a fall/Halloween theme. I like to think it helps get me and others into the holiday spirit.

I made those dino chicken nuggets myself and I am very proud of them

Note: You are not restricted to post this only during Friday, October 25th. This is open the entire third week of Devtoberfest, from October 21st through October 27th. We will award points and badges after that time.

Have fun and let’s all get into that spooky spirit!

entry.title: Field for Net value in the Fiori App Sales Volume Flexible Analysis
entry.content:
Hello everyone, I am working with the standard Fiori App Sales Volume Flexible Analysis. I found out that the technical name of the CDS view for this Fiori App is I_BillingDocumentItemCube. There is one field named Net Value in this Fiori App. I was not able to find the corresponding field in the CDS view for Net Value. Can anyone please help me out with this.

@SAPSupport @DominikTylczyn @Mrak1 @fabio_perfetto @Margit_Wagner @AndreasMuno @Dsk @Enda @Christian_Ries @tamas_hoznek @Sandra_Rossi @abo

entry.title: Fiori Overview page - global filter mapping to card filter
entry.content:
Hi,

in global filter i have multiple filter for example : PlantCard1 , PlantCard2.

multiple cards like : Card1 , Card2. pointing to same odata service entity sets field Plant.

for selectionvariant i want to map filter values of PlantCard1 to Plant for Card1 and PlantCard2 to Plant for Card2.

i see in Selectionvariant - there is option for Parameter and Select option - to pass hardcoded value and by default global filter gets mapped if field names are same. but in case we need map global filter A to card filter B there is no option .

anyone encountered this kind of scenario or any solution ? thanks.

entry.title: ECP LDB PNP get pernr returning all records irrespective of data selection period
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I have created a Z program where i am using LBD PNP to get the data for employees in my ECP system. How ever I notice that when i am using GET PERNR it is fetcing all the data irrespective of the data selection period. E.g. I am having 3 records in my IT0000 and in the report when i am passing current date in the data selection period then also it is fetching 3 records instead of fetching the valid record. Can you please let me know why this is happening in ECP. Is there any config change that needs to be done.

Thanks,

Salish

entry.title: I am getting error message while integrating SAP Enable now with SAP On-Premise system .

Hello everyone

When integrating SAP Enable now with the SAP S/4 Hana On-premise system, I am receiving the attached error message.

Please see what I overlooked and provide guidance.

Thanks 

Manish Gangwal

It's really cool that you already have the field experience on what's actually happening on the ground. That will be an asset as you go further into the world of SAP. 

Have you ever tried the Supply Chain Game ? Give it a shot and let me know what you think!

entry.title: Re: How to set up enhanced Events for Advanced Event Mesh with Application Interface Framework &&&&
entry.content: Also check out our Devtoberfest Session from this Week: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NujHueCBDOw&ab_channel=SAPDevelopers

entry.title: Re: How Do You Decide Your SAP S/4HANA Migration Path?
Enablement of candidate merge jobs 6-7 years after implementation
entry.content:
Hi team,

Our client is using SF recruiting from almost 2017, but not using any candidate profile conversion jobs. Now we want to implement the same, as we have a dependency on our 2 recent projects(eg: OpenText, WOTC)

We have over 2 millions of candidate profiles already in our system. If we go for a complete merge of all the profiles, we foresee 2 different issues

1. Mails will trigger to all the candidates in the system(candidates/employees might get confused of the sudden mail trigger). We can't even enable single sender email as w might lose track of important emails

2. Due to high volume of profiles, the job might take a very long time to run(might break in between)

We are planning to go with 1 week of data for profile conversion initially. 

Does any one have any recommendation on this on how you handled this situation for any other clients?

Regards,

Aswini

entry.title: Re: How to populate compa ratios from the employees profile in reports.
entry.content:
Hi,

We tried breaking our head into this and following is what we did

- Created a custom field with a business rule to have the value from system comp ratio and multiplied it by 1 to manage the business rule. However, this has an issue that it required one time refresh for the comp info portlet for the  value to update for all employees and it does not get updated whenever there is a mass upload or interface input to the SAP EC. Hence we had to stop this custom field 

- We then configured the Story report (taking help from the SAP standard story report set up for Comp ratio). It requires understanding on how the salary range matrix is set up and then called into the table for all fields from job info and foundation master. Then added a rule to report the range where all pay range foundation master matches the job info of the employee. It worked and created a table view data which is downloadable. 

Hope this helps

entry.title: Error Encountered During Status change for Standard Change
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I encountered an error message when the status changed from "In Development" to "To Be Tested" for the standard change: "The transport-related checks have not passed."

Please provide any guidance.

Regards
Jisna Paul

entry.title: how to solve "Version Indicator is not Activated" for international in during migration of supplier?
entry.content:
Dear Team,

please help to solve below error coming during migration of vendor. How we can check which version indicator maintained here. as in ECC we can use Tcode - SA09. but here in cloud we cant.

Environment -> SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud Edition 

App -> Migrate Your Data - Migration Cockpit

entry.title: Quick Actions for Joule
entry.content:
Hi,

Is it mandatory to have Employee Central Quick Action templates configured to use Joule Transactional use cases.

For example, if change of address is requested can Joule just change the address in the portlet without quick actions being configured.

Thanks,

Anand

entry.title: Re: Dimensions Account SAC
entry.content:
@Bernardo_Santos1 

You can only load master data with flat file, if the dimension is a public dimension. So If your Account dimension is a public dimension then you can load it through file.

 

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: SAP Upgradation Error
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

We recently upgraded SAP from version 9.3 to version 10 with the latest PL. During the upgrade, we encountered an error. Following the SAP note, we removed the BP address UDF in version 9.3, and the upgrade was completed successfully.

However, after upgrading the SAP database to version 10 without the UDF, we are now facing an issue. When attempting to recreate the BP address UDF, we are receiving an error stating that the entry already exists.

Could you please advise on how to resolve this issue? We need the UDF as we have important data stored in the deleted UDF.

 
Attached Error.
 
Regards
Krishna Varma

entry.title: Re: How to capture intermediate SSO screen while opening SAP WebGUI using SAP iRPA
entry.content:
We are facing the same issue when trying to login to S4 Public Cloud with an SSO screen in between. Did you already find a solution? For us it seems impossible to get the screen shot to be unique:

Any help is appreciated!

entry.title: Re: The initial value in table structure is not matching...
entry.content:
Hi Manish

 

That's correct. BW providers does not allow NULL values. BW infoprovider tables are always defined with the "NOT NULL" property.

 

br

Roland

entry.title: Re: How do I reset RSMDATASTATE after a load to a Datamar...

  • 1450242 P24: Remove DTP from delta administration; logical deletion
